title: Ah Mudhal Akku Song Lyrics Jithan
stanzas:
Ah muthal akku thaanada
en akka ponnu kikku thaanada
A muthal Z thaanada
iva ever silver thattu thaanadaa

kottaakuchikulla vaayendi
rendu perum  koottan choru
aakki thunnalaam.

ettaa number pola dhegathai
naanum ippa onnaa number
aakka poren da..

Ah muthal akku thaanada
en akka ponnu kikku thaanada
A muthal Z thaanada
iva ever silver thattu thaanadaa

Vazha maramaa irukkuraale
valavalappa sarukkuraale
kandhu vattiyaa perukkuraale
kannu urutti morakkuraale (2)

Mangaa thamizh neekenna
madhaavaram paal panna
mondu mondu thaan thinna
munne vaayendi

otharuvaa pottu kaari
othulaikka gettik kaari
thala thalanu kulungi varum
thaagam theerkum
thanni lorry

pinnazhagu poonthottam
munnazhagu maanthottam
thooram ninu
paadhu kaakkum thotta
kaaran naan.

thaneer panjathil
naan unna paathuputta
kudhikkum nenjellaam
kuththaalam thaan.

veedu soththellaam
un peril ezhudhi thaaren
kooda nee irundha
kummaalamthaan.

Ah muthal akku thaanada
en akka ponnu kikku thaanada
A muthal Z thaanada
iva ever silver thattu thaanadaa

kottaakuchikulla vaayendi
rendu perum  koottan choru
aakki thunnalaam.

ettaa number pola dhegathai
naanum ippa onnaa number
aakka poren da.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who is the lead actor in the movie Jithan?

The lead actor in the movie Jithan is Ramesh.

What is the release year of the song Ah Mudhal Akku?

The song Ah Mudhal Akku was released in the year 2005.

Who composed the music for the song?

The music for the song was composed by Srikanth Deva.

Who performed the vocals for the song?

The song was sung by the talented Shankar Mahadevan.

What is the mood of the song?

The song carries an energetic and peppy mood.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Ah Mudhal Akku from the 2005 Tamil movie Jithan features the lead pair Ramesh and Pooja. Composed by Srikanth Deva and sung by Shankar Mahadevan, this track exudes an energetic and lively vibe. It reflects the vibrant and youthful essence of the characters in the movie. The song's rhythm and lyrics make it a perfect choice for celebrations and parties.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Ah Mudhal Akku from the movie Jithan. This song, composed by Srikanth Deva and sung by the dynamic Shankar Mahadevan, captures a lively and engaging rhythm. Dive into this musical masterpiece that perfectly complements the film's essence.
stanzaMeanings: Ah Mudhal Akku Song Lyrics Jithan
Isn't it the first letter that my sister is like a girl? Isn't it the first letter A and the last letter Z? Who is this silver girl?
In the small place, we can make a meal for two people by opening our mouths.
Like a number, I will also become a number now.
Isn't it the first letter that my sister is like a girl? Isn't it the first letter A and the last letter Z? Who is this silver girl?
The banana tree is there, the one who is growing is looking around, the one who is rolling the eyes is also looking around.
What is Tamil to you, it is like milk from Madhaavaram, it is eaten little by little before it is opened.
The high paths are for you, the green child is dancing around.
You are the one who is making me feel like I am not going anywhere, my heart has fallen apart.
Putting a stick in the hole, the stick will come out, the thirst will be quenched by the water lorry that comes rolling in.
The beautiful flower garden is in front, the beautiful man’s garden is far away, I am the reason that will protect you.
In the water council, I will look at you and drink, all the hearts will be dancing.
I will write your name on every wall of the house, only if you are there will it be a mess.
Isn't it the first letter that my sister is like a girl? Isn't it the first letter A and the last letter Z? Who is this silver girl?
In the small place, we can make a meal for two people by opening our mouths.
Like a number, I will also become a number now.
